reviews.title: Bad experience
reviews.positives: Nothing actually
reviews.negatives: The staff at the check in counter was irritating as they did not give the feel to the guests checking into a 5 Star resort. They wanted full payment for the stay at the time of check in which I found quite embarrassing. I have stayed at Novotel hotels earlier in other locations but they never asked for payment for full stay at the time of check in. It was only at Dona Sylvia that they were insistent for it. The fact that the hotel was charging room rent more than St Regis and Taj Exotica I felt that the staff could have been a little more courteous and not that thick headed. But once I had made the full payment and reached my room and saw the amenities I could understand why the money for the entire stay was charged at the Check in time only because otherwise I or for that matter anyone else would have checked out and gone to St Regis or Taj Exotica. Also at check out time after I reached the counter they sent someone to see if the stuff was used from the mini bar. I had requested them to come and see it earlier but their requirement was that once you reach the reception then only someone will go to check as if we would have stolen or consumed something in that time. Such actions do not qualify for a 5 Star experience but for a 2/ 3 star hotels. Reply bad experience. Will never stay at this resort again

reviews.title: Worst 5 star experience in my life
reviews.text:
I will be honest with my experience at Novotel Dona Sylvia and overall it was really not good. Hotels are meant for hospitality and they lacked it in every sense. Reception and housekeeping staff never really helped us on time with anything.

Firstly, we were treated differently at the time of entering the hotel. No welcome drinks and tilak. We did not mind it as there was nothing exceptional.
Second, we had booked room with twin beds and since we were a family with a kid we wanted to get it joined. Asked the reception staff who handed over us the room key to get it joined and she must have passed on the message as well but no one did that until evening.

Third, for any basic housekeeping needs we called none of them were fulfilled. We had to call numerous times and to call the phone line had a lot of disturbance making it difficult to converse.
Since the phone was not working, we could really not ask for any service.

A technician visited our room at night and said phone cannot be repaired we will have to drill a hole near window to connect the phone to a new line.

*** was the only good part at the hotel he provided a direct number dial able using personal phone for any housekeeping or in room dining requests.
And he helped us getting another room the other day instead of drilling a hole.

Breakfast spread was very good but when we needed something to be ordered no one kind of actually helped. The staff was just acting to help but they never actually helped.

They did provide us baby food and milk which was really appreciable but at times they took forever to deliver in our room and had to call multiple times.

We were offered 2 coupons of beer each which was redeemable at any of their restaurant. We chose Amalia as it had a good vibe. Food was good. At the time of billing, they had not provided any discount and i asked them that in house guests do get 10% off on bill. They said ok we will provide you but since then the system was down they said at the time of checkout you would be given 10% off.
To my shock they did not gave that as well and when asked for they tried calling fee numbers and finally denied. This was pathetic and shocking and clear cheating. I could do nothing but pay the amount.
I could have booked through *** which had 45% off but i chose not to, complete my fault.

But i would really not make the mistake to either visit or recommend anyone this hotel.
reviews.response:

Greetings from Novotel Goa Dona Sylvia Resort.

What you have described is certainly not the level of hospitality and service we strive to deliver. We are also concerned to hear about your experience during breakfast service and the delays in delivering baby food and milk. This is being taken very seriously, and the concerned teams have been briefed to ensure more attentive and timely service going forwa

reviews.title: Great Property, Some Niggles Worth Knowing
reviews.text:
We recently stayed at Novotel Dona Sylvia, Cavelossim, Goa with our kids and overall had a good experience. The property itself is lovely, and the beach proximity was a big plus. Our kids absolutely loved the pool — it kept them happily occupied throughout the stay.

The food was decent — nothing extraordinary, but it did the job. A special mention to Belari at the restaurant, whose energy was infectious and a joy to be around.

Where things fell short was with the room keys for one of our two rooms. Over a three-day period, we had to seek assistance more than 10 times due to recurring key issues — something that became quite a frustration during the stay. The bed in the room was also uncomfortable and creaky, which wasn't ideal.

The in-room service line (dial 9) was another letdown. Every time we called, we were assured our request would be taken care of — but nothing ever followed through. It left us repeatedly waiting and having to follow up ourselves, which added unnecessary stress to the stay.

That said, the staff attitude on the ground was consistently positive and a real bright spot. A special mention  to Sarthak and Alok, who went out of their way to help us with the key issues every single time — their patience and willingness to assist were genuinely appreciated.
A great resort with a lot going for it — just hope the key card system, room maintenance, and in-room service responsiveness get some attention.
reviews.response:
Dear Gaurav,
Greetings from Novotel Dona Sylvia Beach Resort.
Thank you for taking the time to share such a detailed review of your recent stay with us.
We are delighted to know that you and your family had an overall enjoyable experience and that our beautiful beachfront location, pool facilities, and the positive energy of our team added to your stay. Your kind words for Belari, Sarthak, and Alok are truly appreciated—we will be sure to share your compliments with them, as such recognition is very encouraging for our team.
At the same time, we sincerely regret the inconveniences you faced. The repeated issues with the room key cards, the discomfort caused by the bed, and the lack of follow-through on the in-room service line are certainly not reflective of the seamless experience we strive to provide. Please accept our sincere apologies for the frustration caused.
Your feedback has been shared with the concerned teams for immediate review and corrective action. We are closely evaluat

reviews.title: Satisfactory Stay
reviews.text: Novotel dona sylvia is well maintained, spacious property. I booked this resort through Agoda,it was my first time in this resort. Though my stay was brief and overall satisfactory, I faced few issues that can be easily fixed. Check in time is 3 pm is very inconvenient and may not be suitable for majority of tourists. No professional training imparted to desk staff so as they welcome guests with courtesy, I asked for wellcome drink then they provided. No airconditioed waiting area in this property. We were sitting in the waiting area with scorching heat of goa. I booked King villa , without any king size facility. It's just single room at ground floor. Bathroom was clean. But no hand wash provided. Hotel staff forget to give water bottles on second day. Most of the male staff were giving service without eye contact as if they are avoiding people. Food was very good and delicious. There is huge scope of improvement in room service and front desk staff commitment.

reviews.title: Good Property with a little extra casual staff
reviews.text: We visited Novotel Dona sylvia in first week of October 23, our flight arrival was in Night and we reached at around 12 midnight to the hotel, none of the staff actually greeted us, they were so casual that they just guided us to our rooms never bothered to come along to tell us about anything about the facilities etc. in the room. (mind it it they claim to be a 5star property) throughout our stay not a single person/manager ever came to us ever to check whether everything is upto mark or not which you expect after staying in other hotel chains. They were all very very casual they used to simply ignore the guests be it at reception or anywhere else. Only person who stood apart of the rest of the crew with a smiling face was Chef Hira (Bakery) who without fail met us at our table every morning checking on us rest people should actually take a cue from him. I am rating is as a very average kind of place considering the price as the others properties available in the area at the same price range are much much better in service. Sorry Novotel this turned out to be a little disappointing and I don't think we will ever revisit this place again.

reviews.title: Beach is perfect, resort is vast and beautiful, room could be better
reviews.text:
I stayed at Novotel with my husband and 2 kids around Christmas. The resort is really big and the pool is huge and well maintained.
The best part of the stay was the beach and the accessibility to it. Just walk 200 meters  inside the resort and you reach the beautiful Cavelossim beach. Pristine white sand , all of us loved the beach. There is a life guard every few meters 
We were super lucky to have dolphins swim just few metres from us while we were in the water

The resort I found was pricey for the size of the room. We stayed in the boutique King villa room which is really small in area and the bed by the window just accommodates a young child like 10 year old
I particularly had problem with some allergy whenever the air conditioner was on
The breakfast buffet is really sumptuous and great spread, we all loved it. The restaurant seagull is really nice and we enjoyed some dinner buffets too
The staff are very courteous and friendly. My kids enjoyed the indoor games and special thanks to Pradeep and Rama who were the staff at indoor play area
Special thanks to housekeeping staff Pratik Velip who was always kind in providing water and towels and cleaning the room ( with kids spreading beach sand all over )

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: breakfast and  ala cart dinner
reviews.negatives: During summer, Goa climate is humid and hot. Reastaurant must be cool and refreshing. Restaurant must have air conditioner.

reviews.title: Perfect hotel, great pool area and short walk to the beach.
reviews.positives:
Beautiful hotel and lovely grounds. Breakfast was the best we had in any of the hotels we stayed in.
Loved the fact you walk through the grounds to the beach.
I want to give a mention to Ibraham who went above and beyond to help us.
reviews.negatives: Our bed was so hard so had to get a mattress topper, but was no issue as they provided 2!

reviews.title: Kids friendly and peaceful location
reviews.positives: Kids meal and sea facing rooms

reviews.title: One of the finest stay we had in years! Love it
reviews.positives:
The buffet spread was a delightful blend of global and local flavors. The freshness of the ingredients was evident, and the live counters added an interactive charm to the experience. Whether it was the flaky pastries, perfectly brewed coffee, or the made-to-order omelets, every bite reflected the high standards of a five-star dining experience. It was a luxurious and satisfying start to the day, leaving us both nourished and impressed.
The swimming pool was neat, clean and up to mark in safety measures. The Kids play area have bunch of options to entertain kids of all ages. I am delighted with property, its location near cool, clam Cavelossim beach. The walk to beach is just 2 min and they have e-buggy for guests if required. Overall it's one of the finest stay we had in years.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Very nice breakfast with a variety of choices. The room was comfortable and clean. The two swimming pools are nice and well maintained. The resort is very nicely located with restaurants nearby. Beach access is excellent.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The place and the location

reviews.title: Wonderful stay!
reviews.positives:
located deep in south Goa so was perfect for us as we were planning a getaway to a more secluded place. Beach was clean and sparsely crowded. Rooms were comfortable and housekeeping was very responsive and kept rooms clean, given sand from the beach et al.
The check in staff was helpful and the process was swift.
reviews.negatives:
Staff at buffets could have been more receptive and welcoming. It feels, especially in the morning, that the staff at buffet got overwhelmed and didn't know how to manage and respond to request.  
Notwithstanding the above, overall a wonderful stay.

reviews.title: In conclusion, my stay at Dona Slyvia was a dream come true. I can't wait to return to this slice of paradise!
reviews.positives: From the moment I stepped into the lobby, I was greeted with warm smiles and impeccable service. Angali, the check-in greeter will go above and beyond to make you feel welcome and attended to. The check-in process was swift, and the staff took the time to provide a detailed overview of the resort's facilities and amenities.

reviews.title: it was comfortable, cozy, enjoyable stay.
reviews.positives: the spread had a great variety and the food was tasty. it had a mix of Goan, maharastrian and continental touch. the live counters were and tea stall was amazing.

reviews.title: Awesome experience
reviews.positives: Very spacious resort with close the cleanest beach.
reviews.negatives: Nothing, everything is so excellent, with a small exception to Parking space. When the resort is fully occupied parking is bit clumsy.

reviews.title: Execellent
reviews.positives:
It was my wife’s birthday and the hotel staff surprised us by decorating the room and kept a cake as well. My daughter was thrilled by this. My wife loved it too. 

Novotel made sure all our needs were met during our stay.

Special mention to the chefs. The breakfast spread was huge and every dish was delicious!  

We will surely return here again and recommend this property.
